items.n: PACT Protocol - The Standard for AI Agent Content
items.desc: PACT delivers structured, token-efficient data to AI agents. 57x more efficient than HTML scraping.
Complete protocol specification: 5-layer architecture, discovery, schema system, data layer, media, actions, conformance levels, security.
Paste PACT JSON to validate structure, detect type (discovery/response), and check conformance level (L1-L4).
Check how ready your domain is for AI agents. Tests PACT discovery, llms.txt, robots.txt, Schema.org, and response validity.
Side-by-side comparison of HTML vs PACT using real website analysis. ClinicalTrials.gov: 50,000 tokens HTML → 850 tokens PACT (59x reduction).
